headline: Regional Banks Stocks Q1 Recap: Benchmarking Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) and the rest of the regional banks stocks fared in Q1.
